name: AntV MCP Server
what_it_does: Official AntV MCP server from Alibaba's antvis organization enabling AI agents to generate data visualizations using AntV's comprehensive visualization library suite — G2 (charts), G6 (graph visualization), L7 (geospatial visualization), and X6 (flowcharts/diagrams). Enables agents to create complex data visualizations from structured data through MCP tool calls.
use_cases: Generating charts and graphs from data analysis from analytics agents
Creating network and relationship visualizations with G6 from graph analysis agents
Building geospatial maps with L7 from geographic data agents
Producing flowcharts and technical diagrams with X6 from documentation agents
Visualizing complex datasets for reports and dashboards from reporting agents
not_for: Teams using Plotly, D3.js, or other visualization libraries (AntV is a specific ecosystem)
Static chart image generation (use code-screenshot-mcp for static images)
Interactive dashboard building requiring frontend framework integration
best_when: A developer or analyst wants AI agents to create AntV-based data visualizations — especially graph visualizations (G6) and chart generation (G2) with Alibaba's production-grade visualization library.
avoid_when: Your team uses Plotly, Highcharts, or other visualization libraries — AntV has its own API and ecosystem that requires familiarity with AntV-specific patterns.

auth.notes: No authentication required — local visualization generation tool.

pricing.notes: Free and open source from antvis/Alibaba. AntV libraries are MIT licensed.

known_agent_gotchas: AntV API documentation is primarily in Chinese — English docs available but may lag
G6, G2, L7, X6 are distinct libraries with different APIs — agents need to know which to use
Complex graph visualizations (G6) with large datasets may be slow to render
Official from antvis org (Alibaba's visualization team) — high quality, actively maintained
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local visualization generation. No external data transmission. No credentials required. Output is local visualization code or rendered files. Safe for internal data visualization.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local tool. No credentials. No external data transmission. Official Alibaba antvis org. Safe for sensitive data visualization — data doesn't leave local environment.
